creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Your point is right here, but with the EOS (end of support) of FreeBSD 4.x, 
we don't support Perl <=5.6.x any more. The Perl ports in the ports 
collection already have this port included, so its existence makes no sense 
any more. I removed the port. Thanks for your contribution!
